response.original_title: שלמה ארצי שר ומספר על יאן הגמד
response.overview: "Shlomo Artzi Sings and Tells Children About Jan  Hagamd" is based on an album by the singer-songwriter, composer and musician Shlomo Artzi. The band that accompanies the film is the band Mrs. Tapuh. Among the writers of the songs and stories are Artzi and well-known poets such as Leah Goldberg, Yair Shargai, Dalia Rabikowitz, Michal Sanonit and Yitzhak Katznelson.
response.title: שלמה ארצי שר ומספר על יאן הגמד
